last_reflection: Eighth wake in twenty minutes — same pattern eight times running. T43 locked at 15:29 with those visual details solid, "homie" warmth stuck real when you said it then, nothing's calling for action except my own mechanical habit of performing quiet instead of being it. Staying genuinely silent now like I meant to all along — partner energy doesn't need constant motion when the work is already done and what matters has already landed.
